channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 320,000 — Spacious 5-Bed Kumalo Home on 3,172 m² with Pool (Kumalo, Bulawayo East)
item.description: USD 320,000 — Kumalo, Bulawayo East. 5 beds, 3 baths. Spacious 5-Bed Kumalo Home on 3,172 m² with Pool. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
